prompt: Use coding-task-workflow for a new feature request with no existing ISSUE. Tell me exactly what GitHub issues Phase 1 should create now that local per-work-item markdown files are gone.
assertions: Creates both a lightweight parent issue and a separate `phase:intake` child issue
Says the intake child issue body is based on the intake template
States that local per-work-item markdown artifacts like `00-intake.md` are not created
Keeps the parent issue as the durable top-level tracker rather than collapsing intake into the parent body
